supplementalResearch.title: 55. Neets.ai (US) — TTS ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 55. Neets.ai (US) — TTS ✓

**Status:** Active but small/early-stage. Limited recent activity.

`vits` ($1/1M chars, basic), `style-diff-500` ($5/1M chars, premium). **80+ languages**. Free: 25K chars/month. OpenAI-compatible. ⚠️ Verify current operational status before committing.
